basic_details.job_title: NGRI Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 32 Project Assistant, Project Associate and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Project Assistant, Project Associate, Senior Project Associate, Principal Project Associate, Project Scientist
basic_details.short_information: The latest National Geophysical Research Institute (NGRI) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Project Assistant, Project Associate, Senior Project Associate, Principal Project Associate, and Project Scientist posts! Published on the official website, this recruitment drive offers 32 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age group of 35–40 years (with applicable relaxations depending on post) and possessing qualifications ranging from SSC/ITI to Ph.D., depending on the post, can attend the walk-in interview from 18 May 2026 to 20 May 2026. Find all details about the NGRI n

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Project Assistant-I (PA-I): Maximum 35 years (Relaxable upto 5 years for SC/ST/PwBD/Women and upto 3 years for OBC) Project Assistant-II (PA-II): Maximum 35 years (Relaxable upto 5 years for SC/ST/PwBD/Women and upto 3 years for OBC) Project Associate-I (PAT-I): Maximum 35 years (Relaxable upto 5 years for SC/ST/PwBD/Women and upto 3 years for OBC) Project Associate-II (PAT-II): Maximum 35 years (Relaxable upto 5 years for SC/ST/PwBD/Women and upto 3 years for OBC) Senior Project Associate (Senior-PAT): Maximum 40 years (Relaxable upto 5 years for SC/ST/PwBD/Women and upto 3 years for OBC) Principal Project Associate (Principal-PAT): Maximum 40 years (Relaxable upto 5 years for SC/ST/PwBD/Women and upto 3 years for OBC) Project Scientist-I (PS-I): Maximum 35 years (Relaxable upto 5 years for SC/ST/PwBD/Women and upto 3 years for OBC)

qualification.education_qualification: SSC/ITI, B.Sc., MBA, MCA, B.E/B.Tech, M.Sc/M.Tech, B.Sc. Nursing/Diploma in Nursing, BPT/Diploma in Physiotherapy, Diploma in Civil Engineering, Ph.D.
qualification.details: Project Assistant-I (PA-I): SSC / 10th plus ITI Project Assistant-II (PA-II): B.Sc., with Computer Science Project Associate-I (PAT-I): Masters in Business Administration (MBA) Project Associate-II (PAT-II): (i) Masters in Computer Applications (MCA) ii) 2 years of experience in IT related activities Project Associate-II (PAT-II): (i) B.E / B. Tech in Computer Science Engineering (ii) 2 years of experience in IT related activities Senior Project Associate (Senior PAT): (i) Masters in Computer Applications (MCA) ii) 3 years of experience in IT related activities Project Assistant-II (PA-II): B.Sc., in Nursing or 3 years Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery (GNM) Project Assistant-II (PA-II): Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) or 3 years Diploma in Physiotherapy Project Associate-I (PAT-I): 3 years Diploma in Civil Engineering Project Associate-I (PAT-I): B.E / B. Tech in Electronics & Communication Engineering / Electrical and Electronics Engineering / Electronics & Instrumentation Engineering Project Associate-I (PAT-I): M.Sc / M.Sc. (Tech) / M.Tech / M.S. / Integrated M.Tech in Geophysics / Applied Geophysics / Marine Geophysics / Exploration Geophysics / Geophysical Technology / Geosciences/ Earth Sciences Project Associate-II (PAT-II): (i) M.Sc. / M.Sc.(Tech) / M.Tech/M.S. / Integrated M.Tech in Geophysics / Applied Geophysics / Marine Geophysics / Exploration Geophysics / Earth Sciences / Geophysical Technology / Equivalent (ii) 2 years of experience in geophysical data acquisition and processing. Project Associate-II (PAT-II): (i) M.Sc. / M.Sc. (Tech) / M.Tech/M.S. / Integrated M.Tech in Geology / Applied Geology / Marine Geology / Exploration Geology / Earth Sciences / Equivalent (ii) 2 years of experience in active tectonics mapping and GIS/MATLAB Senior Project Associate (Senior-PAT): (i) M.Sc. / M.Sc.(Tech) / M.Tech / M.S / Integrated M.Tech in Geophysics / Applied Geophysics / Marine Geophysics / Physics / Equivalent (ii) 3 years of experience in the field of Electromagnetic Geophysics. (Or) (i) Ph.D in Geophysics / Applied Geophysics / Earth Sciences (ii) 2 years of experience in the field of Electromagnetic Geophysics Principal Project Associate (Principal-PAT): (i) M.Sc. / M.Sc.(Tech) / M.Tech/M.S. / Integrated M.Tech in Geophysics / Applied Geophysics / Equivalent (ii) 6 years of experience in geophysical data acquisition in the field, laboratory measurements and subsurface modelling. Project Scientist-I (PS-I): (i) Ph. D in Geophysics / Applied Geophysics / Geophysical Technology or equivalent field (ii) 4 years of research experience in the field of Electromagnetic geophysics.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies announced by NGRI?
faq.answer: NGRI has announced a total of 32 vacancies for various Project Assistant and Associate positions. These roles are project-based and require candidates to attend a walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for NGRI recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to appear for a walk-in interview with all necessary documents at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Assistant posts ranges from Rs. 18,000/- to Rs. 56,000/- per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA), depending on the specific post and qualification.

faq.question: Q4. What are the minimum and maximum age limits for the NGRI recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit varies by post, with a maximum of 35 years for most Project Assistant and Associate roles, and up to 40 years for Senior and Principal Project Associate positions. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the walk-in interview date for NGRI recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled for 19-05-2026 and 20-05-2026, with specific dates for different sets of posts. Candidates should check the official notification for exact timings and post-wise interview dates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the minimum qualification required for the Project Assistant-I (PA-I) post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for the Project Assistant-I (PA-I) post is SSC / 10th pass along with ITI certification. This is the entry-level position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any specific experience requirements for the Project Associate-II posts?
faq.answer: Yes, for certain Project Associate-II (PAT-II) positions, candidates are required to have 2 years of relevant experience. For example, experience in IT-related activities or geophysical data acquisition and processing.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original certificates of educational qualifications, curriculum vitae, age proof, caste certificate (if applicable), experience certificates, and one recent passport-size photograph. Self-attested photocopies of these documents are also required.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the NGRI located?
faq.answer: The National Geophysical Research Institute (NGRI) is located in Hyderabad, Telangana, with the pincode 500007. Candidates should report to the NGRI office for the walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates regarding fees.
